name: sourcegraph
description: Search code, browse repositories, read files, and explore commit history on a Sourcegraph instance via its GraphQL and search APIs.

keyword_search.description: Search code across all indexed repositories using Sourcegraph's keyword search. Supports standard Sourcegraph query syntax including repo:, file:, lang: filters.

query.description: Sourcegraph search query (e.g. 'repo:myorg/ lang:go func main')

count.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 30)

format.description: Output format: text, json, or raw (default: text). raw returns full GraphQL response.

read_file.description: Read the contents of a file from a repository at a specific revision.

path.description: Path to the file within the repository

format.description: Output format: text or raw (default: text). raw returns full GraphQL response.

list_repos.description: List repositories indexed by the Sourcegraph instance, optionally filtered by a query string.

count.description: Maximum number of repositories to return (default: 25)

format.description: Output format: text or raw (default: text). raw returns full GraphQL response.

list_files.description: List files and directories at a given path within a repository.

path.description: Path within the repository to list (default: root)

format.description: Output format: text or raw (default: text). raw returns full GraphQL response.

symbols.description: Search for code symbols (functions, classes, variables) across repositories.

kind.description: Symbol kind filter (e.g. function, class, variable)

commit_search.description: Search commits by message, author, content, files, and date ranges using Sourcegraph type:commit search.

query.description: Search terms for commit messages or content

author.description: Filter by commit author name or email

after.description: Only commits after this date (ISO8601, e.g. 2024-01-01)

before.description: Only commits before this date (ISO8601, e.g. 2024-12-31)

format.description: Output format: text, json, or raw (default: text). raw returns full GraphQL response.

diff_search.description: Search actual code changes (diffs) for patterns across repositories using Sourcegraph type:diff search.

query.description: Search pattern to find in code diffs

format.description: Output format: text, json, or raw (default: text). raw returns full GraphQL response.

compare_revisions.description: Compare changes between two revisions in a repository, showing file diffs and stats.

base.description: Base revision (e.g. a commit SHA, branch, or tag)

head.description: Head revision to compare against base

format.description: Output format: text, json, or raw (default: text). raw returns full GraphQL response.

get_contributor_repos.description: Find repositories where a specific contributor has made commits.

author.description: Author name or email to search for

count.description: Maximum number of commits to search through (default: 50)

health.description: Check connectivity to the Sourcegraph instance and verify authentication.
